C

CodeGenMojo - Class in org.openapitools.codegen.plugin
Goal which generates client/server code from a OpenAPI json/yaml definition.
CodeGenMojo() - Constructor for class org.openapitools.codegen.plugin.CodeGenMojo

environmentVariables - Variable in class org.openapitools.codegen.plugin.CodeGenMojo

G

globalProperties - Variable in class org.openapitools.codegen.plugin.CodeGenMojo
 

H

HelpMojo - Class in org.openapitools.openapi_generator_maven_plugin
Display help information on openapi-generator-maven-plugin.
Call mvn openapi-generator:help -Ddetail=true -Dgoal=<goal-name> to display parameter details.
HelpMojo() - Constructor for class org.openapitools.openapi_generator_maven_plugin.HelpMojo
 

I

inputSpec - Variable in class org.openapitools.codegen.plugin.CodeGenMojo
Location of the OpenAPI spec, as URL or file.
inputSpecRootDirectory - Variable in class org.openapitools.codegen.plugin.CodeGenMojo
Local root folder with spec files
